etymology.description: Depicts a kneeling figure turning around with mouth open -> original form of ๆ—ก -> related to ๆฌ (ๆฌ ) (qiร n, "yawn") depicting an open-mouthed figure
etymology.interpretation: This character is a pictogram representing a person in a kneeling posture with an open mouth, which visually suggests the act of turning around or making a sound. It differs from ๆฌ (ๆฌ ) (qiร n, "yawn") in orientation, implying a backward rather than forward movement.
